title: malaxis puberula
intro: Malaxis puberula, also known as the hairy green orchid or Malaxis, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Malaxis puberula include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Malaxis puberula include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used topically to promote wound healing and skin health.
